channel.title: Projects on Mohammed Kashalo
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Mohammed Kashalo

item.title: Bank Marketing Campaign Data Analysis
item.description: In this project , i used Bank Marketing Campaign dataset in kaggle to analyze it and extract meaningful insight. Methods Used : EDA (Exploratory Data Analysis) Data Visualizations Data Preprocessing Statistical Tests Correlation Metrices…. and more Link To Github Repository

item.title: House Prices Prediction Model
item.description: In this project , i used house prices dataset in kaggle to predict house prices based on house specs. Methods Used : EDA (Exploratory Data Analysis) Data Visualizations Data Preprocessing Predictive Modeling And More….. Link To Github Repository

item.title: Income Range Classification Model
item.description: For this project I used (Census Income Dataset) from Kaggle, And built a Classification to predict the income range based on several features E.g. Sex, Education, etc…, And I mange to build a classification model with 90% accuracy. Methods Used : Data Preprocessing EDA (Exploratory Data Analysis) Hypothesis Testing Classification Link to Github Repository

item.title: Medical Insurance Cost Prediction
item.description: In this Project I used insurance costs dataset from kaggle and built a regression model to predict the insurance cost. Methods Used : Data Preprocessing EDA (Exploratory Data Analysis) Regression Analysis Machine Learning and more….. Link to Github Repository
